name: Text Analysis / NLP API
tagline: Analyze text with sentiment, keywords, readability, language detection & summarization - no AI API keys needed
description:
A pure JavaScript NLP API that provides comprehensive text analysis without any external AI dependencies. Features include:

- **Sentiment Analysis**: AFINN-style lexicon with 200+ words, negation handling, and intensifiers. Returns positive/negative/neutral with confidence score.
- **Keyword Extraction**: TF-IDF-based scoring with 200+ stop words removed. Returns top 10 keywords ranked by relevance.
- **Readability Scoring**: Flesch-Kincaid Grade Level and Reading Ease formulas with syllable counting.
- **Language Detection**: Supports 10 languages (English, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Italian, Dutch, Japanese, Chinese, Korean) using character frequency and common word matching.
- **Extractive Summarization**: TextRank-inspired algorithm to extract the 3 most important sentences.
- **Basic Metrics**: Word count, character count, sentence count, paragraph count, reading time, speaking time.

All processing runs on Cloudflare Workers edge network for ultra-low latency. No external API calls, no API keys to manage, no rate limits from third-party services.

body.text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This is a simple test sentence for text analysis. Natural language processing is a fascinating field of computer science.
